expectations.evidence: Created RULE 'channels-own-retry-policy' with source: designer. Correctly identified the directive as a design restriction.
NECESSARY_CONDITION 'channel-boundary-includes-delivery-lifecycle' has grounding array, reasoning_chain with IF...THEN structure, and collapse_test describing what breaks.
Uses EVIDENCE, RULE, NECESSARY_CONDITION, RISK — the actual MCP type names. No old types (GIVEN, CONSTRAINT, ASSERTION).
Designer-visible section contains zero code, JSON, element IDs, or proof terminology. Pure conversational prose.

Commentary reads naturally: 'I think the designer is pointing at something deeper than retry configuration...' Observations use italic single-sentence style. Information package flows as domain narrative.
